title: Chinese Buddhist: Song of Enlightenment (Yongjia) (2)
description: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Song of Enlightenment (Yongjia)
introduction: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Song of Enlightenment (Yongjia)

translation.text: From Song of Enlightenment (Yongjia): A core text of Chinese Buddhism, transmitted through the great translation period and forming the basis of East Asian Buddhist practice.
